summary: Iteration 85 - Balance Sheet Feature + Login Error Fix. All features working correctly. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Balance Sheet feature fully working under FY Summary tab. Sub-tabs: FY Summary / Balance Sheet. Balance Sheet shows Tally-style layout with Liabilities (left) and Assets (right), includes Truck/Agent/DC accounts detail tables at bottom. Total Liabilities always equals Total Assets (auto-balanced via P&L adjustment). Login error message now displays inline on the login form.

details: Returns 200 with liabilities, assets, total_liabilities, total_assets
total_liabilities == total_assets (balanced: 86,650.00)
Includes truck_accounts, agent_accounts, dc_accounts arrays
Has as_on_date and kms_year fields
Returns valid PDF (Content-Type: application/pdf)
PDF size: 2668 bytes
Filename: Balance_Sheet_2025-26_*.pdf
Returns valid Excel file (Content-Type: spreadsheetml.sheet)
XLSX size: 5743 bytes
Filename: Balance_Sheet_2025-26_*.xlsx
Sub-tabs under FY Summary: 'FY Summary' and 'Balance Sheet' - both visible
Balance Sheet component loads with data-testid='balance-sheet'
Liabilities panel (red) shows Capital Account, Sundry Creditors
Assets panel (green) shows Cash & Bank, Stock-in-Hand, Sundry Debtors, Loans & Advances
P&L Deficit auto-added to balance the sheet
Total Liabilities = Total Assets = 86,650.00
PDF and Excel export buttons present
Drill-down groups expandable (7 groups found)
Truck Accounts and Agent/Mandi Accounts detail tables shown
Wrong password shows inline error with data-testid='login-error'
Error text: 'Invalid username or password'
Error displayed in red box below password field
Toast notification also shown (Toaster added to login page)
Code review confirms: {summary && selectedParty && (...)} at lines 267-288
Summary bar hidden when no party selected
Placeholder text shown: 'Party select karein upar se dropdown mein'
